title: Carrots to Pizza!!
description: Have you ever wanted to eat pizza in the game? Well, now you can, thanks to this texture pack that turns golden carrots into delicious pizza slices.
body:
Have you ever wanted to eat pizza in the game?

Well, now you can, thanks to this texture pack that turns golden carrots into delicious pizza slices.

If  you like, you can mention what other foods I can substitute to make more textures packs, just tell me the food you want and the food you want to substitute.

Please follow me on my social media where I will be announcing and sharing all my projects.

X: @aff_rooz

Instagram: anhafcraft

Sorry for the translator.
